message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "User" as User
rectangle "云平台(网关)" as Gateway
rectangle "云平台(统计服)" as StatsService

box "监控预警查询" #LightGray
end box

User -> Gateway : 1 监控预警次数
activate Gateway
Gateway -> StatsService : 2 监控预警次数
activate StatsService
StatsService --> Gateway : 3 返回次数
deactivate StatsService
Gateway --> User : 4 (数据库=>五类预警)日/月数量
deactivate Gateway

@enduml
```
